user.title: Hik-Connect Local
user.description: Log in with your Hik-Connect account. The video is pulled directly from the indoor station over your LAN (CPD7); the cloud is used only to fetch the device list and per-device stream key.

data.base_url: Custom API URL (only when Server is Custom)

data_description.server: Pick your region, or Custom to enter an API URL. Global auto-routes to the right region.
data_description.base_url: e.g. apiieu.hik-connect.com — used only when Server is set to Custom.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid account or password (a CAPTCHA may be required — open the Hik-Connect app once, then retry).
error.custom_url_required: Select a server, or choose Custom and enter an API URL.
